title: Remaining Entitlement / 48-Month Exhaustion
desc: Your file shows little or no entitlement remaining, or VR&E says the program will end before graduation.
problemRouterLabel: I am running out of entitlement

fields.name: programCompletionGap
fields.label: Training Still Needed to Finish
fields.placeholder: e.g. 2 terms and final clinical rotation

errors: Entitlement-exhaustion letters often blur accounting issues, aggregate benefit limits, and serious-employment-handicap extension authority.
Veterans near graduation need a completion-focused record showing exactly what remains and why interruption would defeat rehabilitation.

evidenceChecklist.text: Benefit usage history showing Chapter 33 and Chapter 31 months used
Graduation audit or term-by-term plan showing what remains
Evidence that the plan was previously approved through completion or close to completion
Evidence supporting extension factors or serious employment handicap
